tasks.label: Twee Lint (watch)
tasks.detail: Background Twee formatting linter — shows warnings in Problems panel

tasks.label: Twee Format (current file)
tasks.detail: Run format_twee.py on the currently active .tw file

tasks.label: Twee Format (all files)
tasks.detail: Run format_twee.py on every .tw file under passages/

tasks.label: Twee Format (check)
tasks.detail: Exit non-zero if any .tw file is not formatted (suitable for CI)

tasks.label: Twee Lint (all files)
tasks.detail: Run Twee formatting linter once on all .tw files

tasks.label: Build Story
tasks.detail: Build the Twee/Twine story into HTML

tasks.label: Open in Browser
tasks.detail: Build the story and open dist/ghost-in-msheet.html in the default browser

tasks.label: Open with Assets in Browser
tasks.detail: Build with the real assets folder and open dist/ghost-in-msheet.html in the default browser

tasks.label: Debug in Browser
tasks.detail: Build with placeholder assets and open dist/ghost-in-msheet.html with SugarCube debug mode

tasks.label: Debug with Assets in Browser
tasks.detail: Build with the real assets folder and open dist/ghost-in-msheet.html with SugarCube debug mode

tasks.label: npm: test
tasks.detail: Run the Twee lint check and the Playwright test suite

tasks.label: npm: test:release
tasks.detail: Run the exhaustive release-only Playwright sweep (passage-walk-coverage): walks every passage and clicks every visible link, parallelized across ~50% of CPU cores. Excluded from `npm test`; gated on by the Package Release tasks.

tasks.label: Package Placeholder Release
tasks.command: V=$(sed -n "s/.*Ghost in M'Sheet \([0-9][0-9.]*\).*/\1/p" passages/StoryCaption.tw | head -1 | tr . -); : "${V:?version not found in passages/StoryCaption.tw}"; zip -r "ghost-in-m-sheet-v${V}-placeholder-release.zip" ghost-in-msheet.html asset-placeholders

args: $m = Select-String -Path passages/StoryCaption.tw -Pattern "Ghost in M'Sheet (\d[\d.]*)" | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $m) { throw 'version not found in passages/StoryCaption.tw' }; $v = $m.Matches[0].Groups[1].Value -replace '\.','-'; Compress-Archive -Path ghost-in-msheet.html,asset-placeholders -DestinationPath "ghost-in-m-sheet-v$v-placeholder-release.zip" -Force

tasks.detail: Run the release sweep, build the story, and zip it (versioned) with the asset-placeholders folder

tasks.label: Package Release
tasks.command: V=$(sed -n "s/.*Ghost in M'Sheet \([0-9][0-9.]*\).*/\1/p" passages/StoryCaption.tw | head -1 | tr . -); : "${V:?version not found in passages/StoryCaption.tw}"; trap 'mv -f passages/StoryInit.tw.bak passages/StoryInit.tw 2>/dev/null' EXIT; cp passages/StoryInit.tw passages/StoryInit.tw.bak && sed -i 's|setup.ImagePath = "[^"]*"|setup.ImagePath = "assets"|' passages/StoryInit.tw && ./scripts/build.sh && zip -r "ghost-in-m-sheet-v${V}-release.zip" ghost-in-msheet.html assets

args: $m = Select-String -Path passages/StoryCaption.tw -Pattern "Ghost in M'Sheet (\d[\d.]*)" | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $m) { throw 'version not found in passages/StoryCaption.tw' }; $v = $m.Matches[0].Groups[1].Value -replace '\.','-'; Copy-Item passages/StoryInit.tw passages/StoryInit.tw.bak; try { (Get-Content passages/StoryInit.tw) -replace 'setup.ImagePath = "[^"]*"', 'setup.ImagePath = "assets"' | Set-Content passages/StoryInit.tw; & .\scripts\build.bat; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'build failed' }; Compress-Archive -Path ghost-in-msheet.html,assets -DestinationPath "ghost-in-m-sheet-v$v-release.zip" -Force } finally { Move-Item -Force passages/StoryInit.tw.bak passages/StoryInit.tw }

tasks.detail: Run the release sweep, build with real assets, and zip it (versioned) with the assets folder
